title: wrong result caused by the wrong ranges of range scan
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3 (a INT NOT NULL, b FLOAT NOT NULL, c VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (a));
SELECT * FROM t3 WHERE (a NOT IN (1.1, -1.1));
SELECT * FROM t3 WHERE (a NOT IN (2.0, -2.0));
key_bug_features: Incorrect range scan for primary key column values
